title: Medical Imaging Techniques Program Educational Objectives
content:
Medical Imaging Techniques Program Educational Objectives

1. The aim of the program is to train skilled health technicians who can perform examinations using imaging technology including x-rays, computed tomography, magnetic resonance imaging, and mammography properly based on the orders of the doctors and the diagnostic strategies.

2. Students in accordance with the radiology program; theoretical knowledge on the subject acquisition of adequate equipment with imaging center, under the supervision of instructors, to make applications about the subject and after this stage, by rotation in different parts of the hospital of medical imaging unit application is targeted to complete the activity.
